name: Old Virginia Wassail
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple cider, orange juice, lemon juice, pineapple juice, and sugar in a stainless steel percolator.
2. Place the cinnamon stick and whole cloves in the percolator basket.
3. Perk the mixture for 18-20 minutes.
4. Serve in 4-ounce cups. YIELD: Serves 30.
